'''gopapaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:vulnerable|vulnerable]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-p-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vulnerable|vulnerable]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| gopapaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:gopapithi|gopapithi]] || [[word:gopapiji|gopapiji]] || [[word:gopapishi|gopapishi]] || [[word:gopapiki|gopapiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:gopaputhuthu|gopaputhuthu]] || [[word:gopapujuju|gopapujuju]] || [[word:gopapushushu|gopapushushu]] || [[word:gopapukuku|gopapukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:gopaputhu|gopaputhu]] || [[word:gopapuju|gopapuju]] || [[word:gopapushu|gopapushu]] || [[word:gopapuku|gopapuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:gopapufthuf|gopapufthuf]] || [[word:gopapufjuf|gopapufjuf]] || [[word:gopapufshuf|gopapufshuf]] || [[word:gopapufkuf|gopapufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gopapethe|gopapethe]] || [[word:gopapeje|gopapeje]] || [[word:gopapeshe|gopapeshe]] || [[word:gopapeke|gopapeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gopapothotho|gopapothotho]] || [[word:gopapojojo|gopapojojo]] || [[word:gopaposhosho|gopaposhosho]] || [[word:gopapokoko|gopapokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gopapotho|gopapotho]] || [[word:gopapojo|gopapojo]] || [[word:gopaposho|gopaposho]] || [[word:gopapoko|gopapoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gopapofthof|gopapofthof]] || [[word:gopapofjof|gopapofjof]] || [[word:gopapofshof|gopapofshof]] || [[word:gopapofkof|gopapofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:gopapÃŸfthÃŸf|gopapÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:gopapÃŸfjÃŸf|gopapÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:gopapÃŸfshÃŸf|gopapÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:gopapÃŸfkÃŸf|gopapÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:gopapÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|gopapÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:gopapÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|gopapÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:gopapÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|gopapÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:gopapÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|gopapÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:gopapÃŸfthÃŸf|gopapÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:gopapÃŸfjÃŸf|gopapÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:gopapÃŸfshÃŸf|gopapÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:gopapÃŸfkÃŸf|gopapÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:gopapÃŸfthÃŸf|gopapÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:gopapÃŸfjÃŸf|gopapÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:gopapÃŸfshÃŸf|gopapÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:gopapÃŸfkÃŸf|gopapÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:gopapÃḊthÃḊ|gopapÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:gopapÃḊjÃḊ|gopapÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:gopapÃḊshÃḊ|gopapÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:gopapÃḊkÃḊ|gopapÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:gopapathatha|gopapathatha]] || [[word:gopapajaja|gopapajaja]] || [[word:gopapashasha|gopapashasha]] || [[word:gopapakaka|gopapakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:gopapatha|gopapatha]] || [[word:gopapaja|gopapaja]] || [[word:gopapasha|gopapasha]] || [[word:gopapaka|gopapaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:gopapafthaf|gopapafthaf]] || [[word:gopapafjaf|gopapafjaf]] || [[word:gopapafshaf|gopapafshaf]] || [[word:gopapafkaf|gopapafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:gopapasha|gopapasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:gopapshÃḋsha|gopapshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopaprosha|gopaprosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gopapmusha|gopapmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:gopapyasha|gopapyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogopapnkshÃḋsha|gogopapnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogopapnkrosha|gogopapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogopapnkmusha|gogopapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogopapnkyasha|gogopapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:gopapapasha|gopapapasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gopapapshÃḋsha|gopapapshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopapaprosha|gopapaprosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gopapapmusha|gopapapmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gopapapyasha|gopapapyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogopapapnkshÃḋsha|gogopapapnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogopapapnkrosha|gogopapapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogopapapnkmusha|gogopapapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogopapapnkyasha|gogopapapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:gepÃḊpasha|gepÃḊpasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gepÃḊpshÃḋsha|gepÃḊpshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gepÃḊprosha|gepÃḊprosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gepÃḊpmusha|gepÃḊpmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gepÃḊpyasha|gepÃḊpyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogepÃḊpnkshÃḋsha|gogepÃḊpnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogepÃḊpnkrosha|gogepÃḊpnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogepÃḊpnkmusha|gogepÃḊpnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogepÃḊpnkyasha|gogepÃḊpnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:gopfapasha|gopfapasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gopfapshÃḋsha|gopfapshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopfaprosha|gopfaprosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gopfapmusha|gopfapmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gopfapyasha|gopfapyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogopfapnkshÃḋsha|gogopfapnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogopfapnkrosha|gogopfapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogopfapnkmusha|gogopfapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogopfapnkyasha|gogopfapnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|16f482d}}
